name: pexels-search
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler that makes a real outbound Pexels HTTP call (network). NOT assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS only + network-gated). The PexelsBrowser sends FLAT input { query, perPage } (no artifact wrap → handler reads params.query/perPage as the 3rd arg). Validation gates BEFORE the wire: missing PEXELS_API_KEY → {ok:false, error}; empty/whitespace query → {ok:false, error:'query required'}. The test exercises only the pre-network validation gates so the suite never touches the wire. Authored contract pinned by server/tests/photography-lens-macros.test.js.
